All cases are clearly supported by the requirement, as the README specifies rejection of URLs starting with 'mailto:'.

audit.group_title: Enforce maximum URL length when `validate_length` is true
audit.reason: The case 'http://example.com/' does not exceed the maximum length and is not clearly supported as invalid by the requirement. It contradicts the rationale provided.
